reviews.review:
Un très bon jeu avec un potentiel énorme mais malheureusement il fut vendu comme une early access ...

Netcode foireux, exploit à gogo, cheater sur quelques matchs (normal avec easy anti-cheat ...), aucune possibilité de report ...

Toujours pas de MaJ depuis sa mise en vente, très inquiétant pour l'avenir du jeu surtout que le magasin lui est mis à jour et bien sur beaucoup des objets ne sont achetables qu'avec l'argent virtuel du titre (m'enfin qui souhaite mettre de l'argent réel pour des skins ?!).

Je pourrais mettre une éval positive sans problème mais j'ai pour le moment l'impression que les devs (Français en plus ...) ne font rien pour entretenir leur bébé ... surtout à 25€ un accès anticipé ça fait cher !

Unplayable game. Desync still isnt fixed after a month, tackles and slides arent thought out. Instead of updating the game they add stupid ter stegen or ronaldinho bundles. This game has no potential to be a serious game and no potential as a funny goofy game since the mechanics are not thought out (like why can I instantly volley away a rainbow flick).

They also still didnt address the performance issues of this game. All stadiums are just a bunch of ♥♥♥♥♥♥ sprites with like 1 low poly model mixed in. The player models and customization are pretty fine, but still look like they are from a beta. There is no reason this game is heavier to run than rocket league and valorant, since those games are way more graphically intense and rocket league especially is way more physics intense.

The menus also just suck, were quickly thrown in and are totally not intuitive. There is no good oversight in them.

Cancelling queue doesnt work.

Wait a year before buying. The game will probably be dead by then tho, but hopefully they fix the major issues.

I really wanted to like Rematch, the idea is solid and when it works, it can be fun. But honestly, the game is super buggy. I’ve run into crashes, broken mechanics, and weird behavior more times than I can count. It just doesn’t feel finished.
 For €25, this really isn’t worth it in its current state. Feels more like early access than a full release. Also, matchmaking is kinda all over the place, and performance isn’t great either.
 It has potential, but unless they patch it properly, I can’t recommend it right now. Maybe worth grabbing on sale later if they fix the issues.

Game is full of bugs and performance issues. Some of the bugs are game breaking and it is amazing how they were not fixed from the beta. Lots of stuttering even on high-end systems WITH the lowest settings. Abysmal optimization and the stuttering is not only visual, but affects gameplay as well. Balls phase through you, rubber-banding even with a decent ping, inputs get completely messed up during a stutter. Game is filled with trolls that you can't even report. The lack of cross-play was fine but not even having a report function in a game with voice chat and ranked is insane. So get ready to be hit by slurs and own goals. Just try it on Xbox game pass if you have that. Not worth buying at its current state, even if on-sale.

I still think Sloclap needs to figure out the server stability, desync and cheats in ranked issues the game has at the moment but I'm giving them the benefit of the doubt for being a small team.

Edit: 2/17/1016 - Game is still janky. The amount of lag and inconsistency I experience every time I touch this game is way too high. In no other game do I see this kind of lag. Whether it's the ball or other players, I don't get how it can be this bad after being out this long. I guess I'll come back in another couple months. I would love this game if stuff were even slightly consistent, but I don't have the patience to lose to the game more than other players. 

Edit: 11/15/2025 - The server lag is still bad, but they keep pumping out cosmetics instead of fixing this once and for all. Ball can just roll through the keeper, teleport, and more. No other game with this small of an arena has it this bad. I feel like Call of Duty had this sorted out 20 years ago with a much bigger arena.

EDIT: They released more cosmetics before really fixing any of the below issues. On top of that, we now have cheaters, in-game exploits, and noticeable bugs now. The game is really losing its charm to this. Until they fix at least some of these issues, it's gonna be a no from me, dawg. 


---

I liked the game at release. Overall it was a fun and arcade style of soccer. I even recommended it, as it was fun to play with friends. But this weird inconsistent play just sucks the fun out of the game.  

---

Though I have a few gripes with the game. I think I'll probably change my review to not recommend if they put out more cosmetics before addressing at least a couple of these issues. 

First, with the options in their practice mode. There is no restart option during each of the different practice things, so you get sent back to the main menu whenever you finish a course. It should give you the option to retry or go back to the menu where you are looking at the challenges. You should also get the option to restart in the middle of these. Just some simple quality of life stuff that should be here.

Next, the game crashes itself on startup a good portion of the time. It almost always takes 2 attempts to start the game.

There is a bit of server lag. It's especially bad for the goalie. Seeing your guy pick up the ball, then it ends up back at the attacker's feet really messes up the gameplay. 

If you don't restart matchmaking right away when in a group, you have to wait for everyone to get back to the menu before starting again.

If you have a group and want to make a custom match, you can't just pull everyone into the match. You have to leave the group and then re-invite everyone or have them all type in the custom code.
jo
Sigma

Right now, the game is entirely backwards: the "shooting button" is the worst thing you can do to shoot, the "cross buttons" is the worst thing you can do for crossing, using a controller in a, let's call it "football-based game", is genuinely the worst available option. There is no downside to playing absolutely horrible, there is no reason to defend, the entire system is completly messed up.

The game right now is a "hope your goalkeeper has actual liquid nitrogen running through his veins- simulator" because there's gonna be egregious bullsh-t happening in front of goal and none of the defending you may try is gonna help.

It currently feels like a annoyingly bad version of Fifa Street and punishes you for actually playing football.

Cant fault the devs much for this, seeing how the game gained meteoric popularity, but the servers are genuinely horrible. Through beta the experience was perfect, now there's a 500ms delay in anything you see, no matter your service or ping. Every game you'll see your leg go clean through a ball just to watch it magically float over and through you like you weren't even there. You'll see animations and hear their vfx on your side that apparently never happened for the server. 

Right now, the game isnt worth it's price and it pains me to say it for something i'd have gladly paid double while having the time of my life through beta

Edit as of Sept. 6th Update: It's been two updates and TWO improvements have been made. That unfortunately is the only positive note within an ocean of horrendous decisions, horrifying implementations and outright awful development. The game has become clunky as all hell, everything that was wrong is still wrong, everything that was good got reworked into being horrendous. Something as basic as MOVEMENT has become unresponsive to unreedemable levels and there is still ZERO consistency, to the point it's only consistenly inconsistent.

It feels like the Devs that made the beta have been uncerimoniously fired and every new dev brought in has gotten a bat to the temple. That or we've devolved to AI vibe-coding.

EDIT as of Dec. 3rd: the game is an RB+A simulator. it's the single strongest ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ button (combo) in gaming. NOTHING you do will ever beat just spamming the dribbling button. You can get the ball, look at the floor and run the entire lenght of the pitch spamming RB+A and you'll probably even score, it's that horrendously strong right now. Still not reccomendend in the slightest.

Rematch hat eigentlich das Potential, den Fußball-Gaming-Bereich komplett zu revolutionieren. 
Das Konzept ist innovativ und bietet genau die Art von frischem Gameplay, die man sich schon lange gewünscht hat. Leider wird dieses positive Spielerlebnis stark eingeschränkt durch zahlreiche technische Probleme. 

Häufige Abstürze und nervige Bugs sorgen nicht nur für Frust, sondern haben mir auch schon etliche Ranked Matches gekostet. Solange diese grundlegenden Fehler nicht behoben werden, kann man das volle Potential von Rematch einfach nicht genießen.

CALCIO IN STILE ARCADE. Molto divertente sopratutto da giocare in compagnia! Consiglio vivamente di acquistarlo se sei un appassionato di calcio o se stai cercando un prodotto per divertirti con gli amici. Il prezzo è ottimo per quello che offre, non esiste alcun pay to win, quasi tutti gli oggetti acquistabili dal negozio sono grindabili con la valuta del gioco (collab. escluse).  Tutti i giocatori hanno le stesse opportunità di successo, si tratta di un vero e proprio skill-based game ed è forse questo il vero punto forte del gioco! In attesa dell'uscita del crossplay il mio voto complessivo è 9/10.

Allo stato attuale, il gioco presenta svariate problematiche tecniche che ne ostacolano in modo serio la sua utilizzabilità. Di frequente, bug assidui nonché crash inattesi rendono impossibile completare una sessione di gioco in modo stabile. In determinate situazioni, si sono pure verificati riavvii del sistema, ad indicare potenziali problemi seri di ottimizzazione o compatibilità.

Oltre a questi elementi, è rilevante la sussistenza di exploiter. L'interazione con altri giocatori diviene esasperante poiché pregiudicano l'imparzialità e il pregio del gioco.

Tenuto conto del costo alquanto oneroso e in virtù di quanto detto, sconsiglio l’acquisito ora poiché, secondo me, ingiustificato. Anteriormente alla possibilità di essere reputato un prodotto maturo, il titolo necessita di un lavoro di ottimizzazione più approfondito. Un bilanciamento più accurato è pure necessario che sia effettuato.

Не плохая игра, но мне абсолютно не понравилось управление, и это при том, что при запуске говорят, что лучше играть на контроллере, только вот интуитивно для того или иного действия хочешь нажимать не те кнопки, которые надо. Оптимизация тоже пока страдает слегка, но думаю это поправимо. В целом, то же самое, что и с Rocket League - легко начать, тяжело освоить, только вот, здесь проблемы связаны с управлением. Хотя может дело в том, что я в подобные игры никогда не играл. В целом рекомендую, как любителям футбола, так и нет, но на данный момент показалось не то, чтобы контента мало - отсутствие возможности дриблинга мне показалось не очень хорошим решением. Зато кастомизация, сезоны и пропуск уже есть.

В общем и целом, ощущения от игры смешанные - не так интересно, как рокет лига в первый раз + неудобное управление (опять же на контроллере, на котором и советуют играть), но с другой стороны очень красивая игра, хоть и мало контента доступно на данный момент и даже кастомизировать арену под себя не получится с самого начала. Про управление говорить не устану, это правда пизд3ц

The game would greatly benefit from additional mechanics to enhance its depth. One suggestion is to incorporate a scorpion kick move, which would add a dynamic element to gameplay. Additionally, allowing players to control the ball with their head without pushing it would create a more intuitive and realistic experience.

The menu interface could be improved to be more user-friendly and self-explanatory, ensuring that players can easily navigate and understand their options.

In terms of customization, more variety and creativity are needed, as many of the current skins appear similar. Offering more distinct and unique customization options would greatly enhance player engagement.

Overall, while the game is still in its early stages and we shouldn't judge it too harshly, these improvements would contribute to a more polished and enjoyable experience.

One of the greatest sports games I stumbled upon which is unfortunately held back by bad servers, netcode and weird to sometimes game-breaking bugs.
I didn't I think I was into this when I first saw the reveal for it, but after participating in the playtest back in April, I was hooked immediately. The controls feel right, the presentation is great and the condensed ruleset ensuring constant on-pitch action make this a refreshing and unique breath of fresh air in the sports video game genre.

Son gros point noir, c'est les gros tardos qui se prennent pour des personnages de Blue Lock. Avec vos vieux personnages clonés de Bachira et l'autre daron aux cheveux verts et noirs, vous cassez les noix à vous la jouer solo. J'espère vous allez vous péter les chevilles un jour. Aucunes passes, ça veut dribbler mais ça ce fait prendre la balle en 3sec.

Et ta ceux qui se croient dans Captain Tsubasa et te TIRE DES PASSES au gardien a 40m du but. Je parlerais pas des gardiens qui sortent de leurs cages pour faire les beaux et tenté de dribbler les adversaires, se la font prendre, et de 30m se font caler un but car personne pour défendre les cages. (Encore mieux quand ça te fait perdre le match.) Et je dirais encore pire quand ils ont le culot de ragequit de leur bêtise.

Voilà, c'est un peu près ce qui vous attend pour ceux qui veulent jouer au jeu, mais j'insiste. Les gros bandeurs de Blue Lock là, je vous haïs du plus profond de mon être. Le manga est cool, pas vous.

The game clearly has potential, but it won't reach the glory, mostly because its player base consists of football fans who can’t quite handle the concept of teamwork. So, no, I can’t recommend it.

If you’ve got a group of friends to squad up with, you’ll probably have a blast and even crush it. But if you dare to play with randoms, be prepared to buy yourself a new gamepad or keyboard. You’ll run into toxic players, self proclaimed Messis and Ronaldos who never pass the ball, and teammates who troll for no reason. It’s basically a premium package of frustration, wrapped up in a group of aimless dudes.

And of course, big thanks to the devs for not adding a report feature and never giving penalties. At this rate, don’t worry, soon you won’t have any sane players left to disappoint.

Uninstalling. See you never.

Big congrats to the devs for delivering a masterpiece of disappointment that somehow manages to redefine “fun” in the most creative ways.

Matchmaking feels like a lottery where everyone loses, teammates act like they’re in a deep meditation session, and the netcode? Oh, it’s so nostalgically bad you’ll find yourself fondly reminiscing about Street Fighter 4’s launch year.

This is not a F2P game, yet it features a battle pass, a shop, and paid currency? Seriously?

Plus, every match is filled with players rocking the same “unique” skins — curly hair, nose rings, and that vitiligo pattern that turns everyone into a walking “laughing cow” mascot.

Honestly, seeing that face on my pitch every damn game is the real reason I’m considering smashing my screen.

PS: Rest assured, if you can’t sleep at night after fleecing over a million people with this trash, at least that mountain of cash will buy you a nice mattress — and maybe a little self-esteem.

Rematch is a lot of fun and is easily one of the best football games I've played because of its gameplay style. It features fresh mechanics and exciting new elements that make each match feel unique and enjoyable. 

However, the game has serious performance issues. It’s buggy, laggy, and there are several technical problems that hurt the experience. Unfortunately, there haven't been any updates or fixes so far, which is disappointing. 

Overall, it's a great concept with a lot of potential, but it really needs attention from the developers.


Updated Review (After a Few Months)

The downfall of this game genuinely needs to be studied.

When Rematch first launched, it felt like it could become one of the best football games on Steam. The gameplay was fresh, the mechanics were fun, and every match felt exciting and different. It had everything going for it.

Unfortunately, the developers completely dropped the ball.

Every single update introduced new problems instead of fixing existing ones. The game is now riddled with bugs, not minor or rare glitches, but major issues that actively ruin matches. I clearly remember playing with friends and running into serious bugs every two or three games. This became so common that it stopped being surprising and started becoming frustrating.

What makes it worse is the lack of meaningful fixes. There’s been no real effort to stabilize the game, and over time, that frustration killed the fun. Me and my friends slowly lost interest, not because the core idea was bad, but because the technical state of the game made it unbearable to keep playing.

This could have been something special. Instead, poor updates, constant bugs, and a lack of proper developer attention completely wasted its potential.

As it stands right now, the game is simply not worth it.


Second Update: Most of the glitches and bugs are gone now, but it’s a bit too late. I’m still having fun with my friends, though there aren’t many active players anymore.

ATUALIZAÇÃO: O JOGO PIOROU! REPITO, O JOGO PIOROU.

Great gameplay, great mechanics and heavily reliant on teamplay. This last point is also it's weakness, climbing in ranked can be difficult if you are a solo player since it is really hard to keep roles and formations in place, if you can climb with a full team instead, do it.

After I had played more than 50 hours, I could say that this game has a huge potential.

However, there are couple of bugs which need to be fixed ASAP. There are also some connection issues that force players to log out. If these bugs are fixed in future, REMATCH can reach much popularity than it is attracting now.

No matter how many bugs I have countered and made me really annoying sometimes, I still love the concept and idea of what this game is based on. I hope the upcoming updates will carry on this game into much better place.

Desync at some points unplayable

Had immense potential, but the netcode has been broken since the game’s release, and it will continue to plague this game until it is fixed. The fact that the game prioritizes players with high ping leads to huge discrepancies in the priority system. Players teleport all over the screen, and your character gets rolled back, making it feel like you're getting dragged through the mud. The update release schedule has also been dreadfully slow. Cross-play came out months after launch, despite the developers telling people that it would be there around the release window. The physics system is also very lackluster. You don’t ever stop the ball despite intercepting the keeper (which happens in real life, mind you), and the ball flails around with a mind of its own in the air whenever an interception occurs. And then there are the hitboxes, which make active defense (tackling and intelligent/aggressive defensive plays) feel miserable while rewarding passive defense (defensive stance blocking most options with little thought put into it), slowing the pace of the whole game, and leading to fewer defensive scenarios. This is due in part to the inconsistent nature of the tackles in this game. The small hitboxes, in addition to the poor netcode, lead to visual differences that end up leading to unfair outcomes for either the opponent or me. I have had moments where I literally tackle people while facing completely away from them and vice versa. These are also moments where the netcode and ping discrepancies make it feel as if there is an invisible barrier around certain opponents. There have been instances where my character's foot is touching the ball, yet nothing happens, but when the opponent’s foot is literally hitting a whole foot away from me, I get intercepted? Make it make sense. All in all, the game is definitely far from dead, but it will never reach anywhere near its full potential at this rate. The game still being unfinished, almost a YEAR after launch, is a testament to that. I hope this game can prove me wrong in the future, but as of now, I don’t see that happening.

The game showed great promise, and I'm very sure that's what the developers wanted. But the current situation, which has not changed since several beta tests, is depressing. The game has a lot of problems: bugs, glitches, bad network code. As a person who has given away enough money, I am not interested in watching some average person simply teleport to the ball by spamming all the buttons, not to mention that sometimes the game can be played with a good Internet connection. The developers don't want to see the problem at close range, apparently their vanity has clouded their brain. I really hope that all this will be fixed soon and stability will reign in the game.

I also want to note that mentally weak people who mess up phrases and score goals are not punished by the system in any way, a reporting system is needed so that such freaks sit in a shadow or ordinary ban to come to their senses that they will not be able to whine.

FIFAランクが日本より低い国がなぜ低いのか体感できるゲーム
学生時代スポーツで人気者じゃなかったやつを見つけられるゲーム

ポジティブな部分：
・某会社のサッカーゲームのプ〇クラブのように11人集めてやる必要がない
・10代～20代で陰キャでもソサイチや個サルの空気感を体感できる
・運動神経がない人でもサッカーやフットサルを理解していたら動かしてるだけで多少面白く感じる
・ピヴォ、フィクソ、アラぐらいを3人フレンドで揃えたらランクもほぼ負けない。プラチナぐらいまではストレ　　　ートイン出来る

ネガティブな部分：
・フットサル、サッカーの基本構造を理解してないプレイヤーが多すぎる
・マクロが分からないやつに限ってミクロゴミだったり他責やオ〇ニードリブルで失点の起点になる
・スポーツなのにVCで報告するやつが皆無
・アジアのサッカー発展途上国のプレイヤー達がことごとくお察し
・馬鹿みたいにスライディングすんな
・ミニマップすら見れないプレイヤーが山ほどいる
・ラグ修正、バグの修正で強い行動がサイレントで変更されてる
(修正の時に内部数値も変えてるような挙動変化)

勝てない人へ：
５ｖ５のフットサル。
貴方がやる事は対面の管理です。攻撃局面ではあなた一枚剥がせばＤＦの寄せの構造が変わります。2枚目、3枚目を剥がす前に受け手を見よう。
守備局面ではあなたが前に残る分味方は不利です。カウンターで点が取れないならフィクソの所を最低でも抑えにいけ。ハーフラインまでは守備しましょう。
アラをやる時は内側の味方の状況みましょう。ピヴォがサイドに流れてるのに逆サイド絞らずに待ってたらフィクソが上がってこないといけなくなるのでネガトラで死にます。アイソレ要員のアラは必ず味方のピヴォとフィクソの場所を見て逆算してリスク管理もしましょう。

最重要：味方とミニマップをみて重ならない。スペースを探す。プレーを決めたら黙って選択を変えない。

１－０でも勝ちは勝ち。ゴレイロのキャッチの判定が強い以上、人数をかけても無理な時は無理です。ならばネガトラで失点しない事を気にした方が勝率が上がります。

Blue Lock, el juego.
 A pesar de que la regla número 2 es "siempre juega en equipo", acá puede más el individualismo, todos son delanteros, todos quieren su gol, incluso su rol de arquero no lo puede detener, todos son verdaderos egoístas, al menos esa es la experiencia solo queue. 
 Con amigos todo cambia, jugar como un equipo es más divertido, un gol producto de varios pases y toques es más gratificante que un individuo gambeteando a tres. 3v3, 4v4 y 5v5, opciones variadas para todo tipo de grupos de amigos, y si son más, las partidas personalizadas harán el trabajo, nadie queda atrás.
 En lo negativo, los servers dejan mucho que desear, hay partidas que son injugables debido a la inestabilidad de estos, personas warpeandose, atajadas claras que no se producen, despejes que no suceden, es una lástima por que suelen suceder seguido. Hay servidores de us-east que funcionan mejor que algunas de south america.
 Por otro lado se me hace muy raro que no exista ningun tipo de reporte, personas malas perdedoras abandonan a mitad de partida, cometen autogol, insultan y no hay penalización alguna.
En fin, es un muy buen juego especialmente para jugar con amigos, solo no lo recomendaría.

Concept of the game is fun and for the first few matches the game is actually fun. That is until you start to play ranked. Ranked in theory should place you with people around the same skill level as you. However, I have played on Xbox (gamepass) and here on Steam where on Steam I’m Bronze and on Xbox Gold. And I get the same type of players or sometimes even better on my bronze rank.

It makes 0 sense and makes the game extremely frustrating when you just have to watch someone lob the ball over you and your teammates all across the field while he scores using his own lob as an assist. 

Also tackling and sliding are too easy to counter as the player controlling the ball. When doing a sliding as an defender you should be able to control your direction mid sliding to aim towards the ball. Not having to watch your character slide over the ground for ages while you see the attacker run off or just lob over you. 

Furthermore the netcode is terrible. Sometimes it will seem like you hit the ball or stop the ball as a goaly but you’ll just see the ball go past you after half a second.

Teamplay is also not rewarding and a score system per player doesn’t helpt that. Too many people just want to ego and try to keep the ball while always trying to pass at the last moment when it’s already too late. 

I guess you can still have fun with a team of friends. But for now playing alone is just frustrating.

К онлайн играм я стараюсь писать не отзыв, а писать то, что мне не хватает в игре или то, что я бы исправил/улучшил.

1. Не хватает  движений за вратаря. У нас есть только 2 варианта действий. Это прыжок в сторону и скольжение боком на земле, пытаясь животом защитить ворота. \
А где парирование ногами и руками, ловля летящего мяча с прыжком вперед и вытягивая руки и ноги, чтобы охватить большую площадь, защита в приседе, отбивание кулаками и ногами?

2. Половина людей, насмотревшись тик-токов больше вариантов нападений как через стену над головой вратаря не знают, чтобы это пофиксить предлагаю сделать изогнутую часть стены над воротами, чтобы было тяжелее предсказать угол отражения мяча. 
Я сам против этого мувмента ничего  не имею, но игра и люди не будут развиваться, если поле будет без изменений. Можно пробовать в виде тестового формата. Типо обычная карта и с изогнутыми стенами.

3. Не хватает коммуникации с командой противника. Ребята разработчики мы играем в футбол, а не в шахматы. Это не светская вечеринка. Сделайте возможность, чтобы после гола команды слышали друг друга на протяжении 5 секунд например. Мне и моим тиммейтам есть что сказать. Особенно моему товарищу Григорию XD
Если кто-то переживает за буллинг просто дайте опцию слышать команду соперника или нет, и чтобы это было видно в момент 5 секундного общего разговора.

4. Удары головой можно сделать активнее. Сейчас это просто отражение удара лбом. Удар головй это удар со своей направляющей силой и углом атаки.

5. Предлагаю добавить возможность после ничьей не играть дополнительное время до первого гола, а давать возможность голосовать: допвремя или 11 метров на вратаря по очереди до победы. Выбор вратаря должен выбираться голосованием команды или самовыдвижением.

6. Разработчики я понимаю что вам нужны деньги все дела, но если вы продолжите выпускать коллаборации с брендами только за реальные деньги никто в них бегать не будет. Все таки советую хотя бы пару базовых вещей добавлять за обычную внутри игровую валюту. Таким образом и вы, и бренды будут видеть, насколько людям это реально нравится. 
Вы выпустили коллаб с пумой, но я так и ни разу не встретил парня или девушку в шмотках от пумы. Подумайте.
Так или иначе спортивные бренды одежды нуждаются просто в рекламе своих продуктов и дополнительной ассоциации логотипа со спортом.

7. Где татуировки на лицо? (хотя может я их просто не нашел)

8. Последним пунктом выражаю вам благодарность. Игра действительно хорошая, успехов вам и надеюсь у вас все будет получаться в будущем.
P.S. Ждите конкурентов с волейболом, баскетболом и не дай Бог керлингом.

[b]“Rocket League with foot.”[/b]

[b]Rematch[/b] brings that street football flair we’ve missed for years — a fast-paced, skill-heavy game that thrives when players work together. When your team is clicking, the game is [i]pure joy[/i]. Quick passes, clean assists, and stylish goals — [b]teamwork is everything[/b] here.

That said, I won’t lie — my [b]first 15 hours were rough[/b]. I play on a controller (which you should too!), and while [b]passing is slick[/b], [b]shooting took a lot of getting used to[/b]. But stick with it — once it clicks, it [i]really[/i] clicks.

[b]Performance is top-tier[/b]. No lag, no sync issues — just smooth, responsive gameplay. But your experience can depend heavily on your teammates. End up with [b]selfish or toxic players who never pass[/b], and it can get frustrating fast.

That’s why I really hope the devs add:
• [b]Crossplay support[/b] – to boost the playerbase and improve matchmaking.
• [b]Avoid player feature[/b] – so I don’t end up with the same toxic teammates again.
• [b]Better ranked system + new game modes[/b] – more ways to play and climb competitively.
• [b]Custom controller bindings[/b] – please let us tweak our inputs!

[b]Rematch has a solid foundation, and I’m loving it more with each match.[/b] With a few quality-of-life additions and more content, this could become a staple in the genre.

[b]If you enjoy Rocket League, teamwork, and street vibes — don’t sleep on this one.[/b]

EDIT: It's sad to see that the player count has dwindled so hard, but it's all on Slow-clap, and their slow ass fixes and updates.

After spending 26 hours on the final game + 7 on the betas, I can for sure say that this game is the most addicted I've been to a game in years. I enjoy many games, but it's been some time since I've just wanted to spend more and more time in a game. Of course it helps that I am a football, blue lock and galactic football fan, and the Arcade nature of the game makes you feel really awesome. 
The game is also very rewarding when it comes to tactical team play, just like in real life football and just like that, you can also dominate a game but lose in the end. It is what it is. 
I totally recommend this, and I believe that the price is a bargain for the fun that you get.

When it comes to the issues and bugs, I've been mainly playing ranked, and personally, I've never experienced a game breaking bug myself, that would make me hate the experience. 
If you're hesitating but it looks fun to you in the videos, then it's probably your cup of tea.
The controls and game mechanics take a couple of hours to get used to, but after that, you are in for a treat.

The game has been losing players every day for months and all the devs do about it is make more cosmetic updates.

Rematch is one of those games that absolutely shines when you’re playing with competent friends. When everyone knows what they’re doing, communicates, and works together, the matches feel intense, strategic, and genuinely fun. It creates those “just one more game” moments where time disappears.

That said, the experience can be rough around the edges. The game is still glitchy at times — weird physics moments, occasional desync, and the usual jank that can pull you out of the action. To the developers’ credit, it has improved since earlier builds, and patches have made things noticeably smoother, but it’s not completely polished yet.

If you have a solid group to queue with, it’s an easy recommendation. Solo play or playing with uncoordinated teammates can be a much more mixed experience.

TL;DR: Great fun with skilled friends, still a bit buggy, but clearly getting better.
It's like Rocket League, but without everything that makes Rocket League fun.

Antigua Reseña: Una decepción disfrazada de novedad

Después de varias horas intentando disfrutar Remach, tengo que decirlo sin rodeos: es una decepción absoluta. Lo que podría haber sido una propuesta fresca en el género de los juegos de fútbol termina hundiéndose por problemas técnicos inadmisibles y una experiencia de usuario frustrante de principio a fin.

El principal problema? Los servidores. Son simplemente nefastos. Da igual si estás con cable, con una buena conexión, o con un ping aceptable de 45 ms: el juego no es jugable. Los jugadores se "teleportan" constantemente, se desincronizan las jugadas, y cada pase o movimiento termina dependiendo más de la suerte que de tu habilidad. No hay sensación de control. Intentar jugar una partida competitiva es como jugar un partido en medio de una tormenta eléctrica con los ojos vendados.

Y no estamos hablando de un indie en early access. Esto es un lanzamiento completo, que se promocionó como un “nuevo estándar en el fútbol digital”. La realidad es que no alcanza ni los mínimos básicos para una experiencia online decente. Que en pleno 2025 un juego salga con este nivel de latencia generalizada, congelamientos, caídas de conexión y errores de sincronización entre jugadores es imperdonable.

La frustración que genera es constante. Uno entra con ganas, trata de ser paciente, pero es imposible no hartarse cuando ves que el rival desaparece y reaparece diez metros más adelante, o cuando el pase que diste medio segundo antes sale volando en otra dirección por culpa de una colisión mal calculada que solo el servidor “vio”. Lo peor es que este problema no es ocasional: es la norma.

Y no es solo el lag. La falta de optimización general también se hace notar. Hay microcortes en menús, la interfaz es poco clara, y hay veces que ni siquiera se puede armar un equipo sin que la pantalla se congele o tire un error genérico. El emparejamiento es otro chiste: te puede tocar con alguien que te saca 30 niveles de ventaja o con bots que no se mueven. La experiencia está completamente rota.

Lo más triste de todo es que hay buenas ideas enterradas debajo de este desastre técnico. Algunos elementos jugables tienen potencial, pero eso no alcanza si no podés ni siquiera terminar un partido sin gritarle a la pantalla. No sirve tener lindas animaciones si el balón atraviesa jugadores o si cada acción se ve interrumpida por stuttering.

En resumen, Remach es un juego que salió sin estar listo, con un backend digno de una beta mal cerrada. Y lo peor es el silencio o la falta de respuestas claras de los desarrolladores, que siguen sacando contenido cosmético en vez de resolver los verdaderos problemas.

No lo recomiendo bajo ningún punto de vista. Hasta que no arreglen los servidores y optimicen el juego como corresponde, es mejor invertir tu tiempo y tu dinero en otro título que, al menos, te deje jugar sin sentir que estás peleando contra la conexión todo el tiempo.

El juego es extremeademente divertido y tiene muchisimo potencial. Las partidas son dinamicas y tan adictivas que jugas una tras otra. Es muy casual friendly y muy competitivo a la vez debido al skill ceiling y las mecanicas. Tiene varios bugs pero es esperable, de hecho no me molestan mucho los bugs, pero sin duda el mayor problema es que desde que salio hace casi un mes hasta ahora los servidores andan de manera pauperrima, todos los games tengo una latencia de entre 120 y 200 ms. 1 de cada 5 partidas son las que puedo jugar con ping estable (~40ms)  y eso es muy determinante sobre todo en los partidos. Ya con 50 horas me gustaria jugar mas rankeds sinceramente pero no me da ganas de mandar un game para perder porque soy uno menos en nuestro team jugando con 200 de ping. Lo peor es que es una cuestion client side, vos podes tener 200ms pero tu compañero o tu rival no. Con mis amigos somos todos de una misma zona y hay partidas en las que unos tienen ping y otros no. El juego se torna injugable cuando hay tanta diferencia de latencia, asi que hasta que no arreglen eso me duele mucho pero debo darle una review negativa.

Look it's good but consider these points:

+ Addictive gameplay that is fairly pick up and play while having extreme depth if you can get good
+ Few games feel as satisfying to improve in as Rematch
+ Character customisation has nice depth, it's no Pro Clubs but nothing goes above it in football games EXCEPT Pro Clubs
+ Graphics are amazing to look at especially for a game with a cartoony style. If you enjoy Sloclap's other games in this artstyle like Sifu you'll feel right at home
+ Swapping keepers is as simple as 2 people moving between box and outfield, meaning anyone can swap in or out of keeper seamlessly
+ Options for 3v3, 4v4 and 5v5, stacks of any size. Private lobbies can have any setup of up to 5 a side.
+ Good quality for a game that is £21 (approx $25 USD) at full price
+ While MTX in a paid game stinks, if it interests you, the game has tie ins with real footballers and brands. Currently you can get Puma branded gear and packs for Ronaldinho and Ter Stegen complete with good quality character skins so you can look like them. There's evidence that Kobbie Mainoo is next and more will certainly come.

- Netcode is arse. It's not as bad as some people would have you believe but desync and lag does happen and it's more noticeable in this when it does compared to other games
- MTX and Battle Pass systems in a paid game sounds innocuous until you remember Warframe has a Free BP with no paid option and other games that have both of these in the same are 99% FTP. Unlike other paid games with this like Helldivers, you can't grind the premium currency, it's open-wallet-jutsu only.
- Game is unforgiving for new players. You almost always WILL suck for your first few games, and if you don't like the sound of that then I wouldn't bother buying it
- Some critical bugs remain despite Sloclap being decently proactive, including one where your character may refuse to dribble the ball even if you lock onto a dead ball on the ground, but can still kick it. 
-  Rank distribution is all over the place. You cannot drop out of a rank division (Gold to Silver, for example) but frequently you'll see Bronze players in the same lobby as Elites. I can't confirm if the ranked modes are like this but I have no reason not to believe this can be the case.
- Ranked is only available in 5v5 although 4v4 and 3v3 ranked will most likely come eventually.
- No crossplay, although Sloclap have gone on record saying it will happen.

It's a good game but it feels like a 95% done early access at the moment despite extensive beta tests. This game could be more but it could also fall victim to the "it should have been more when it came out" camp. Buy at your own risk, I guess.

El juego, a pesar de ser entretenido, se encuentra en una situación problemática. Experimentamos numerosos fallos que afectan la jugabilidad, como lag, ping inestable y problemas con la tickrate. Lo más frustrante es la presencia de jugadores tóxicos (trolls) en los niveles Platino y Diamante, junto con la ausencia de un sistema de reporte funcional. Es lamentable que estos problemas persistan desde la fase de prueba inicial, sin que se observe una mejora significativa.

Resulta inaceptable que errores tan básicos como el ping sigan sin resolverse, y que no haya mecanismos efectivos para reportar comportamientos negativos o para que el equipo de soporte revise las quejas. La situación actual es preocupante, ya que permite la posibilidad de trampas (cheats) sin que haya consecuencias.

En resumen, el juego tiene un gran potencial, pero la falta de compromiso por parte de los desarrolladores y la ineficacia del soporte técnico son decepcionantes. Por lo tanto, no recomendaría su compra hasta que se aborden y solucionen estos problemas fundamentales.

El juego, actualmente, está en un estado nefasto. Es divertido, sí, pero tiene muchos errores. Por ejemplo: lag, ping, tickrate, y lo peor: trolls en Platino y Diamante. Y, por supuesto, un botón de reporte inexistente. Además, hay que añadir que no trabajan en mejorar estos errores, ya que llevamos así desde la beta 1.

¿Cómo es posible que aún sigamos con errores básicos como el ping, sin botones de reporte ni alguien que revise las peticiones? Ahora mismo, puedes inyectar chetos y nadie se va a dar cuenta.

Conclusión: El juego es muy bueno, pero los desarrolladores y el soporte son nulos. No recomiendo comprarlo hasta que solucionen estos problemas.

Ich finde REMATCH echt gelungen! Das Spiel macht richtig Spaß und „bockt“ sich, wie man so schön sagt 😄. Ich spiele es besonders gerne mit meinem Bruder zusammen – wir haben echt viel gelacht und spannende Matches gehabt.

Für mich ist es tatsächlich das einzige Fußballspiel, das ich überhaupt spiele – und das sagt schon einiges! Die Steuerung ist einfach, der Spielstil angenehm arcadig, und es eignet sich super für kurze Spielsessions zwischendurch.

Klar, es gibt noch ein paar Bugs hier und da, aber ich habe den Eindruck, dass die Entwickler aktiv dran sind und mit Updates nachbessern.

Fazit: Wer ein unkompliziertes, unterhaltsames Fußballspiel für zwischendurch sucht, wird mit REMATCH auf jeden Fall seinen Spaß haben – besonders im lokalen Multiplayer!

[h3]Потрясающая игра в концепции и безумно раздражающая в реальности[/h3]
Я редко пишу обзоры, но эта игра требует этого. [b]Если вы соревновательный игрок с жаждой побеждать, но который не готов тренироваться сутками напролёт[/b] - перед покупкой игры обязательно прочитайте обзор.

Rematch как концепция потрясающая, то, до чего буквально никто не мог додуматься - просто футбол, где ты управляешь своим персонажем, в онлайне и прикольным ощущением. И вот всё: и длительность матчей, и визуальный стиль, и анимации ударов, и звуки - ощущаются потрясающе. Первые часы не оторваться от игры, она затягивает, ты понимаешь, сколько всего можешь реализовать и тебя это тянет, тем более матчи ищутся и идут очень быстро - состояние потока обеспечено.
Однако, чем больше играешь, чем больше учишься играть, тем больше приходит осознание факта, который ломает всё погружение в игру - от тебя в этой соревновательной игре мало что зависит. Разумеется, если ты играешь лучше других, ты будешь повышаться по рейтингу, НО ключевым является момент, когда ты дорос до какого-либо уровня. Я на момент написания обзора нахожусь в середине золота, поднимался до калибровки на платину - средний ранг во всех играх. И после игр я понимаю, что никакие мои действия на данном этапе не приводят к победе или поражению - это просто [b]ощущается[/b] как рандом, что является приговором для игры лично для меня. Дело не в тиммейтах, дело в голах. Здесь две проблемы:
1) [i]Вратарям почти ничего не нужно делать для того, чтобы ловить мячи[/i]. На моём уровне игры существует явный дисбаланс трудозатрат между тем, чтобы забить гол, и между тем, чтобы гол засейвить. Из-за размера ворот и особенностей "магнита" вратаря к мячу он, просто стоя на месте (абсолютно не двигаясь) перекрывает чуть ли не половину области ворот, из-за чего даже всю игру доминируя забить (опять же на моём уровне игры) можно только при везении. Даже играя слаженно с командой, где все дают друг другу пас, давать возможность вратарю видеть метку, куда должен упасть мяч после отскока от стенки убивает как потенциал к обучению стояния на воротах, так и всю сложность, потому что у рук вратаря самый высокий приоритет и просто встав на метку он гарантированно забирает мяч от любых угроз. Но сюда кладётся ещё и второй минус.
2) [i]Net-код (наверное)[/i]. Зачем заходить в онлайн-казино, если можно получить его в игре Rematch? Вот эта уже фундаментальная проблема, которая ломает весь интерес к игре. Я стал замечать, что одни и те же мои удары при одних и тех же действиях вратаря иногда залетают, а иногда не залетают. И всё - рушится вся магия игры. Перестаёшь получать удовольствие от забитых мячей или хороших разыгровок, потому что понимаешь, что в другой точно такой же ситуации вратарь бы забрал мяч. Основная игровая механика и способ победить на моём уровне игры при хорошей игре вратаря зависит от рандома. 
В общем, если вы готовы заплатить столько денег ради минимум 30 часов приятного и интересного геймплея - можете покупать. Но если вы, как и я, горите в играх и любите побеждать, понимая, какие ваши действия ведут к победе, а какие нет - ни в коем случае не берите, поберегите свои нервы (мой ноутбук уже пережил одну аварийную перезагрузку от удара по столу).

Como en los demás juegos de Sloclap manejar al personaje es increíble, el feeling que se transmite a la hora de realizar cada movimiento es algo que tienen medido, saben trasladar bien lo físico al mando, y esta vez con un deporte, que siempre es complicado.

Además, han conseguido lo que ningún juego de fútbol siquiera se había planteado: que haber jugado al fútbol sea un plus. Se nota muchísimo cuando alguien ha jugado antes por la manera de moverse en el campo.

Una pena que esté lastrado por cosas típicas de los competitivos online (parches, problemas de conexión, cambios de balanceo y mecánicas, jugadores tóxicos...) Un modo de un jugador le vendría de perlas para desquitarse un poco.

Y por último: era obvio que el movimiento más roto del juego iba a ser el único que casi nadie usa...

El pase de la muerte.

EDIT:
Después de varios parches, ya no existe el juego del que hablo arriba. Otra víctima de los comidos, como le pasó a Overwatch. Por hacer caso a un pequeño nicho de jugadores el juego ya no es ni parecido a lo que era de lanzamiento. Ahora es lento, pesado, incómodo, no da pie a ninguna estrategia que no sea el desgaste del contrario haciendo movimientos repetitivos. Las últimas sesiones que he tenido con este juego han sido de ganar partidos y no querer seguir jugando de la sensación de pérdida de tiempo en algo anodino.

Ojalá Sloclap no hubiese tocado lo que funcionaba por 4 mermaos, o que al menos recapaciten y devuelvan el juego a un estado mucho más fresco como el que tenía al inicio. Lo peor de todo es que han conseguido que ni la gente tóxica sea lo peor del juego. Una pena.

Look, I love this game. It has been some of the most fun I have had on a video game with friends in the last couple of years, by a long shot. The gameplay loop is incredible, and pulling off a well-thought-out play gives you a type of high that most games can’t do. But at the infancy of this game's life span, I cannot sincerely recommend anyone spend the $40 CAD price tag. 

Firstly, the servers have a 50/50 chance of being laggy with desync issues that make the game feel unfair and frustrating, especially in high stakes ranked matches which leads me to my second point

RANKED SHOULD NOT HAVE BEEN ADDED ON RELEASE!!

Ranked matches are nothing more than a quick match with a goofy little badge and RP number that will go down and up solely based on whether the game hates you enough to match you with bottom-feeder Bronze III’s or the reincarnation of Messi. A ranked mode with ZERO semblance of a MMR system is frankly lazy and should have been added at a later date to fully flesh out because as it stands, this is not it. 

Lastly I have gripes with the lack of options and functions that would otherwise be implemented in most, if not every game that has come out in the last decade. I’ll list a few features that are not in Rematch that should have been included on release since this review is getting much longer than anticipated.

• Crossplay 
• Reporting system (so many racist, vulgar, and downright obnoxious human beings)
• Match History
• Adding people in-game (although there’s a healthy amount of toxicity in this game, I have run into some genuinely good people that I would have liked to play with again)

To round off this review I would like to say that I really do enjoy this game and would absolutely love to see it improve and grow its community even more. I believe it to be one of the top 3 best sports game ever made and if the developers keep giving this game love I know it can be much more than that. 

Also, I want to send love to all the Keepers out there because you guys are godsends and don’t get the respect that you deserve ❤️

I love, love, love this game. The best football game is here beneath the issue of netcode, lag, glitches, and lack of content.
This game is so much fun. Even if you don't like or follow footie it's a blast. Scoring a goal is scintillating and connecting passes with your teammates is a joy. But there are issues with the connectivity that ultimately compromise the experience. 

First and most pertinent is the netcode. It is already hit or miss (even with an ethernet connection), but the game loses it altogether when a tackle is placed. Whether it's you or the opposition, the game does not know that exactly happened; you will apply a tackle, win the ball, but the ball will rubber-band back to the opposition. Another example is the game not having your player "attach" to the ball and just has them run over it entierly, even though you were touching the ball itself.
I understand that there are multiple instances of what is happening per each person playing, but games like this, where milliseconds matter, need to be better for the game to be competitive.

Beyond that, there is a bit of a problem with people being glory-hunters with the ball. That is not necessarily a problem with the game, but I want to mention it nonetheless. 

It's with the netcode and connectivity that stop me from recommending the game. I already love it so much, and will watch it grow, but you will play the game and experience frustration when your character ignores the ball, or when you win a duel only to have the ball go any-which-way. 

Wait for a while, and play it once it improves.

El juego, a día de hoy, es un auténtico desastre. ¿Entretenido? Sí. Pero lleno de fallos que no tienen perdón. Lag constante, ping por las nubes, tickrate de chiste… y lo peor: trolls campeando en rangos como Platino y Diamante como si esto fuera una guardería. ¿Y el botón de reporte? Ni está, ni se le espera.

Lo más grave es que los desarrolladores miran hacia otro lado. Desde la beta 1 seguimos igual. ¿Cómo puede ser que en pleno 2025 aún haya problemas tan básicos como el ping o que no haya ni un sistema decente para reportar a tramposos? Hoy por hoy, puedes meter chetos y ni dios se da cuenta.

En resumen: el juego tiene potencial, sí, pero la dejadez por parte del equipo es vergonzosa. Hasta que no se tomen las cosas en serio y pongan orden, no merece la pena gastar un euro. ¡¡¡Malditos Socialistas!!!

El juego, actualmente, está en un estado nefasto. Es divertido, sí, pero tiene muchos errores. Por ejemplo: lag, ping, tickrate, y lo peor: trolls en Platino y Diamante. Y, por supuesto, un botón de reporte inexistente. Además, hay que añadir que no trabajan en mejorar estos errores, ya que llevamos así desde la beta 1.

¿Cómo es posible que aún sigamos con errores básicos como el ping, sin botones de reporte ni alguien que revise las peticiones? Ahora mismo, puedes inyectar chetos y nadie se va a dar cuenta.

Conclusión: El juego es muy bueno, pero los desarrolladores y el soporte son nulos. No recomiendo comprarlo hasta que solucionen estos problemas.

This is an amazing game  and I'm  having tons of fun but I can't recommend  in this state unless you know you willl love this game and it doesn't frustrate you too much. If the devs get  their ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ fingers out fix the bugs, stop putting in paid for content and ads ranked 3s' and 5s this game will easily be my game of the year. 

The bugs are vast and game breaking I've seen all sorts from getting locked into animations of catching the ball as goalie only for it to not attach to getting stuck in to speed burst randomly going off. The game doesn't have crossplay and it's servers are so desynced it's  unbelievably frustrating, seriously don' buy if you can't handle absolute bs occurring on your screen and it losing you matches. 

I haven't tried ranked yet but hope that comes soon. 

Also what the actual ♥♥♥♥ are these guys playing at ? It's 2025 there is no excuse for not having cusstom keybinds in a game.. and I  just noticed this isn't even early access? (unless i'm missing something I can't see it anywhere on the page) That is bad enough but then having buttons hidden on different control schemes just baffles me.. you are hiding "look at ball" button in a different controller layout? 

that said I almost have 100 hrs in this game and i'm literally just playing quick play.. I am competitive and would love to try ranked but don't want to until I have a full squad. (again please give 3s) 

One other thing and i'm not sure if it's a bug is goalie dive animations, these seem to be at random sometimes you dive super low other times you dive very high if this is because of specific things it should be in the tutorial I can't figure out why sometimes it goes low, missing saves to this feels trash.

All that said playing 3s in this game is so much fun with friends if you know you will be able to overlook the game breaking bugs, the  inconsistent animations, massive desync, and the annoyance of ball hogging fifa tards then buy this game. Otherwise it's probably best to at least wait for fixes. The monetary stuff in the game feels kinda slimy with how much is wrong with it and a battle pass in a paid for game is highly unfriendly to the consumers here and makes me worried that the devs might try just get the easy cash grab butt hopefully they sort the game out and we will potentially have GOTY potential here.

Am Anfang gab es – wie bei jedem neuen Spiel – Probleme mit den Servern und der Steuerung. Das ist ganz normal bei einem neuen Titel. Es ist ein wirklich gutes Spiel.
Allerdings wird es zunehmend frustrierender, da immer mehr „Messis“ und „Ronaldos“ im Spiel unterwegs sind, die alles alleine machen. Ab einem Dreierteam kannst du nur noch etwas erreichen, weil viele Spieler kein Teamspiel beherrschen.

Nach dem letzten Update wurde das Spiel deutlich langsamer, und das Problem mit dem Zweikampf ist immer noch nicht gelöst. Da die Zweikämpfe völlig willkürlich ablaufen, kann das Spiel wirklich zum Ausrasten sein.

Ich habe es anfangs gerne gespielt und hätte grundsätzlich immer noch Lust darauf. Doch in der aktuellen Version – nach dem letzten Update – ist es einfach nur noch frustrierend: zu langsam, zu viele Einzel-Spieler, und die Zweikampf-Situationen sowie die Ballannahmen sind viel zu unberechenbar.

Nach dem aktuellen Update ist das Spiel leider nicht mehr zu empfehlen. Mal sehen, was in Zukunft noch geändert wird. Warten wir es ab.

Stand Juli 2025





Ich habe das Spiel nach etwa 6 Monaten Pause wieder ausprobiert, in der Hoffnung, dass es inzwischen vernünftig gepatcht wurde. Leider ist genau das Gegenteil der Fall – das Spiel wirkt aktuell sogar schlechter als zuvor.

Die Kamera nach Toren ist nach wie vor verbuggt: Der Ball bleibt teilweise einfach stehen und erst nach einigen Sekunden synchronisiert sich das Spiel wieder. Solche Fehler sollten in diesem Stadium eigentlich längst behoben sein.

Noch gravierender ist, dass der Torwart weit außerhalb des Strafraums den Ball in die Hand nehmen kann und damit das gegnerische Team komplett aushebelt. Das ist kein Einzelfall, sondern tritt regelmäßig auf und beeinflusst das Gameplay massiv.

Auch die Ballannahme wirkt extrem zufällig und wenig nachvollziehbar. In vielen Situationen bekommt man den Ball trotz klarer Position nicht, während der Gegner scheinbar mühelos durch mehrere Spieler hindurchläuft und sich den Ball sichert. Das fühlt sich weder fair noch spielerisch sauber an.

Hinzu kommt, dass Gegner nach identischen Tacklings oft deutlich schneller wieder einsatzbereit sind als die eigenen Spieler. Das mag zunächst subjektiv wirken, wurde aber über längere Zeit hinweg beobachtet und tritt konstant auf.

Unterm Strich hinterlässt das Spiel aktuell einen unfertigen und unausgereiften Eindruck. Das ist besonders enttäuschend, da das Spiel bereits seit dem 19. Juni 2025 veröffentlicht ist und die Beta-Phase längst vorbei sein sollte. Für ein fertiges Spiel sind solche grundlegenden Probleme einfach nicht akzeptabel.

Ich habe das Spiel zu 100 % abgeschlossen und dabei mehr Frust als Spielspaß erlebt. Sollte sich hier nicht grundlegend etwas ändern, werde ich es nicht mehr spielen.

Sehr schade – mit funktionierenden Mechaniken könnte das ein richtig gutes Spiel sein.

Stand: 29.03.2026

[h1] Review of Remach ⚽🕹️ [/h1] 
____________________________

[h2] Summary and overall rating: 4 / 5 ⭐ [/h2]
Remach is a great, competitive game that really makes players feel like they're playing soccer thanks to its well-designed mechanics, its “look and feel” on the pitch, and its great sound design. I'm actually surprised that it took so long for a developer to create a soccer game like this, because the idea is as simple as it is ingenious. I recommend it to anyone who enjoys the gameplay. Unfortunately, the game still has a few technical issues and some toxic, exploitable mechanics that will hopefully be addressed and fixed in the near future.

However, since the developers have already released several patches in the first few days, I'm giving them the benefit of the doubt. 
If you want to experience soccer in a truly realistic and tactical way and constantly improve your skills, then you'll have a lot of fun with Rematch, even if you don't like soccer in real life (that's my personal opinion). Once the most annoying flaws are fixed, I can give the game 5 stars without hesitation and recommend it even more highly to everyone. ⚽🔥
____________________________

[h2] Gameplay & Mechanics: 5 / 5 ⭐ [/h2]
Most of the fundamental mechanics of the game are well thought out and designed, are fun to execute and play, and also offer a lot of depth for advanced moves and skill expression, if you want that.
 
For this reason, however, getting started with the game and the various mechanics is not quite as easy and quick as it might be with other games. But if you stick with it and get into it, the game rewards you with great gameplay possibilities and fast-paced action.
Pretty much everything you can imagine in soccer is possible, including free and realistic movements, a wide variety of passes, crosses, lobs, etc., and all common types of tackles and covering techniques can be executed. Of course, trickery with the ball is also included and can be performed in a very individual way using various techniques.
 
However, all mechanics and techniques must be used with great precision and good timing to ensure that the balls land where you want them to, as the game is fortunately not semi-automated, running almost like it's on rails and magnetically pulling the ball towards teammates, the goal, or something else. But when you score a goal with a beautiful shot, or you're the last man standing and you prevent a goal with your last ounce of strength, it feels great.
____________________________

[h2] Graphics, sound & feel: 4.5 / 5 ⭐ [/h2]

Some of the games really feel like you're playing street soccer with a few friends on the block. The limited overview, the realistic sound design, and the tactical depth and freedom. Games like FIFA or PES have never come close to achieving this feeling for me. 
The graphics are simple, in the “Fortnite” style, but they serve their purpose wonderfully and ensure that the game appeals to a wide range of players, almost regardless of their system performance.
____________________________

[h2] Technical condition: 3 | 5 ⭐ [/h2]

Unfortunately, the game still suffers from some major and several minor technical hiccups, such as the netcode during tackles or the interaction calculations between the goalkeeper and the ball in some situations. Some menu pages or areas of the UI are slightly buggy, sometimes cannot be opened, or scroll without you pressing anything. There are also a few mechanics that are currently very toxic and are often exploited.

For example, the annoying and complete camping of players at the opposing goalkeeper, where the whole game is spent waiting for a high ball to arrive so that you can somehow get the ball in and score a goal. Unfortunately, this is possible because the game deliberately does not use the offside rule, but a different system needs to be implemented to prevent this excessive camping directly in front of the keeper throughout the game.

I was really surprised and impressed by the game's deep mechanics and gameplay elements. After a few hours of getting used to it, I can hardly tear myself away because for a little game threre is almost almost 6 Minutes left Spare Time to play... 😁⚽ And it's great fun, whether in the small and more technical 3vs3, the more tactical 4vs4 or the really tactical 5vs5. Only very new players, who unfortunately haven't even played the basic tutorial, can detract from the fun a little if they really can't contribute to the team or even accidentally play against the team with sloppy passes. I hope this will settle down after a while when most players have had some playing time and gained experience.
____________________________

[h2] Thank you for reading! ♥️😊 [/h2]
I hope I was able to help you a little with your purchase decision.
_____________________

Soccer is a game that will never die, but in the hands of Sloclap, it may soon come to an end.

I still enjoy playing this game, and I'm not bored with the core gameplay yet, but seeing my friends leave the game, the online player base gradually shrink, the developers communicate less and less, and matches take longer and longer to find... I'm starting to lose hope. The developers don't know how to make service games: they could have looked at their competitors in terms of game support, but they only managed to learn how to make paid battle passes in a paid game, which you can't even get afterwards - it's disappointing.

It's disappointing that there are no expansions, not even “upward” (new mechanics, improvements to existing things), but “outward” (events, cosmetics, collaborations, seasons, in-game teams, in-game tournaments with small prizes, clans/guilds, world rankings, expanded in-game statistics). 

Five months, zero changes. Some minor updates, yes, but that's it. Somewhere they fixed “buggy mechanics,” somewhere they improved aiming, but players need the fun to continue. And for many, the fun of the matches is gone because the game offers nothing new. The key problem is that you are your own director. If you want, there will be interest and development, but if you don't, then after the first hour, the game will offer you nothing new.

I sincerely believe that the game can rise like a phoenix from the ashes, it just needs a little more attention and time. I'm leaving positive feedback because I don't regret the 200 hours I spent on it, but I'm pessimistic about the future of this game so that I don't get even more disappointed in the future.

UPD: Forget it.

Куча багов, отвратительная работа серверов и отсутствие БАЗОВЫХ вещей для онлайн игры по типу системы репортов - заставляют дропнуть игру до лучших времён, которые судя по всему и не наступят, ведь разработчикам важнее добавить коллабу с пумой и очередной скинчик футболиста, нежели прислушаться к игрокам и улучшить свой продукт.

С таким подходом надеюсь эта игра побыстрее загнётся.

Cosas que sí me gustan del juego:
El juego es divertido de verdad. Las partidas son rápidas, frenéticas y cuando no te toca a un niño de 14 años pensando que es el puto protagonista del juego, y pasa el balón, te lo pasas genial.

Tiene ese punto arcade adictivo que hace que digas “venga, una más” aunque tengas ganas de darle ese puñetazo a tu monitor.

Cuando hay buen equipo, sale partidaza, de esas que piensas: “buah, esto ha sido una locura guapísima”.
Puedes lucirte con jugadas chulas.

Cosas que no me gustan del juego:
Jugar con gente en Rematch es como si hubieran soltado a cuatro retrasados del manicomio y les hubieran dicho: “hala, a correr detrás del balón”.

Todos se creen Messi. Si aparte de chupar el balón de esa manera chupan otra cosa tiene un trabajo grantizado, se tiran todo el puto partido al lado del portero rival esperando a que les caiga el balón para que ellos sean los que marcan, y si encima este tipo de personaje son el portero salen de la portería con el balón pensando que se harán a todo el equipo rival solo para perder el balón con el primer jugador rival y regalar un gol. Esta gente vive en otra realidad, ala que también cabe destacar, que si cometes un fallo, preparate para que te spameen la frase de "Bien hecho!" como si fueran. Encima no puedes reportar a las ratas de mierda, te trollean y se van de rositas. Como dice un amigo que tengo, "me parece increible que con la cantidad de jugares toxicos que tiene este tipo de juegos, no han puesto nada para reportar o incluso bloquear a estos jugadores"...

En fin si tienes un grupo de amigos juegazo, y si no te tocara jugar con los retrasado que chupan mas que las put4s.

Aparte que la conexión es una basura, los servidores pesimos, te puede tocar una partida hyper lageada y la siguiente tambien, tienes el balon y de repente te da un lagazo, y el balón lo tiene el rival en la otra punta del campo

(Añadido) Hace poco he vuelto y sigue siendo lo mismo, no han cambiado nada, solo la tienda. Tremenda basura de juego.

(Añadido 1 año después) sigue con errores de conexión, me ha emparejado literalmente 7 veces con un equipo rival, que todos tenían entre 100 y 120 de ping, y te traspasaban con el balón terrible juego, pd: La tienda tiene cosas nuevas (para variar hay que actualizar algo, que se note que al menos trabajan en algo del juego)

Let me start with what is good about this game.
Great concept and lots of fun at first.
That's all. There is nothing more good about this game.

Now let's talk about what is wrong with this game.
Their first bugfix was 4 days after release for pro/elite editions and it was good, they fixed a lot of random crashes although not every.

Then they said something about fixing network problems but less lags could be players leaving game as well as they fixing something because A LOT of players left quickly with how unstable and bug infested is this game. We are talking about almost 93k peak to 42k peak in 2 weeks after release for normal edition!

Now we are 3 weeks after pro/elite release and there is. Nothing fixed. Literally devs ghosted entire playerbase and only left guy who is responsible about cosmetics updates (game have weekly cosmetics add to store).

So summarizing. Game is a dumpsterfire, laggy gameplay, non-working passes for mouse/keyboard players, a lot of easy QoL changes that are ignored and more complaints about cheaters by every day while there is no report button inside game (they want you to submit discord post).

And maybe the worst from all, there is silence from devs. Not one post about what they are doing or what they already have done and just testing. 
There is no dialogue from any dev even when people post a lot on discord (main thread about passing on m&k have over 1.5k posts in it), I have not seen dev response to anything yet (outside of telling one guy to not @ staff on discord).

Meine Meinung nach den ersten 100 Spielstunden

Rematch hat definitiv Potenzial. Das Spiel ist noch relativ frisch, daher gibt es aktuell noch viele Bugs und unausgereifte Mechaniken. Ich bin aber zuversichtlich, dass die Entwickler diese Probleme mit der Zeit in den Griff bekommen werden.

Besonders viel Spaß macht Rematch, wenn man eine feste Gruppe oder mehrere Freunde dabei hat. Das gemeinsame Spielen bringt hier eindeutig den größten Reiz.

Das Rangsystem hingegen finde ich eher enttäuschend. Es ist viel zu einfach gestaltet, und vor allem die Tatsache, dass man ab einem bestimmten Rang nicht mehr absteigen kann, nimmt dem Ganzen die Spannung. Dadurch müssen sich Spieler ab einem gewissen Punkt kaum noch anstrengen oder weitergrinden – das ist schade.

Wenn das Spiel jedoch weiter optimiert und verbessert wird und die Entwickler mehr auf die Wünsche der Community eingehen, sehe ich hier enormes Potenzial für eine echte 10/10. Wie man so schön sagt: Man kann Rematch lieben, und man kann es hassen – beides gleichzeitig ist möglich.

The game has great potential, especially for players looking for a competitive and skill-based football experience. The core gameplay is enjoyable and creative, but there are serious issues that need to be addressed before it becomes truly playable in the long term.

-The UI in both matchmaking and practice modes lacks essential features.

-There are no quick chat options for solo players, which makes coordination nearly impossible in ranked matches. Simple commands like “Centering,” “Crossing,” or “Start running” would be very helpful.

-Dribbling can feel broken—sometimes players become untouchable and both ball and characters start teleporting.

-Goalkeeper mechanics are inconsistent. Even when positioned correctly, your player sometimes fails to pick up the ball.

-There's no report system, and unfortunately, trolling is common in ranked games—own goals and intentional throwing happen too often.

Adding workshop option, fixing rank matchmaking and bugs, focusing on UI can make this game playable in the long run.

This game has so much potential, but falls short on almost every level at the time of writing this review. The controls feels janky and gameplay sluggish. You never really know if you'll keep the ball or not, and most of the time just have to hope for the best. 

With the boost prio, you get some sort of advantage in certain situations, but even that don't work properly most of the time.
It's full of connection issues, bugs and in general feels like a unpolished and sloppy product.

Where I will give it props is that it has a decent foundation to build upon, but that's only if they actually continue expanding. The dribble moves are limited, and how the physics interact with both you as the player but also your teammates and opposition really makes the game a "fishing" simulator in the sense that you chuck the ball up to the striker and pray that they're either better than the opponents or just have rng in duels.

I'm by no means a pro at this game, so of course take it with a pinch of salt, but from a casual/semi-tryhard standpoint it falls short on most of the key aspects of a good football game, and when I'd rather play Volta on fifa it tells me enough to think that if they dont do something soon, this game will die sooner or later.

So if you are interested in picking this up, don't do it unless you have 3 or more friends to play it with (the matchmaking is AWFUL) or if you're really interested in tekky and hard mechanics and want to invest the time to understand the mess that this game is. I will be praying for updates and hope the devs listen to feedback from the community.

ゲームは面白いですが、根本的にサッカーができない人が多いため賛否があると思います。
このゲームで重要なのは、守備と玉離れです。


■守備について
マクロだと、基本マンマークしないと崩壊します。
カバーも無いのに最終ラインでドリブル勝負して取られる→失点のパターンが一番多いです。
ミクロだと、とにかく抜かれないDFが重要です。
スライディングですぐに諦めることはせずに、後の先でタックルをするのが良いです。
これができればダイヤはすぐに行きます。
前線でボール待ちしているあなた。あなたのせいでフリーの敵が生まれます。
あなたがフリーということは相手もフリーです。失点したらあなたのせいです。


■玉離れについて
上でも書いた内容と少し被りますが、とにかく玉離れが重要です。
最終ラインでのドリブル、カバーの無い状況でのドリブルは取られたら即失点につながります。
常にマップや味方の位置を把握し、ボールを受ける前から次にどこに出すかを考えておくことが重要です。
ボールをもらってからモタモタドリブルをしているあなた。周りはなぜパスを出さないのかと思っています。
取られるくらいなら雑に前線にボールを出してください。

Rematch是一款极具深度的硬核公平竞技游戏。如果不够有趣，我也不会投入如此多时间沉浸其中。我亲身参加了中国区官方比赛，从小组赛一路奋战至总决赛（最终获得亚军），以下几方面是我的切身感受：

1. 动态角色转换系统

游戏没有固定位置分工，与传统足球游戏截然不同，要求玩家在比赛中实时交换角色。它绝不是呆在一个位置上（例如门将只负责守门）就能轻松应对的。以我担任门将的体验为例，不仅要在防守回合守护最后防线，还需在进攻回合迅速转变为策应者。这种设计彻底打破了传统的位置壁垒，迫使每位玩家掌握全局。

2. 游戏平衡性与BUG修复

作为小型开发团队，官方在平衡性调整和BUG修复方面表现得相当积极。起初我曾担心制作组会忽视玩家反馈，但事实证明他们持续在收集意见并不断推进优化（尽管修复节奏稍显缓慢，考虑到团队规模，完全可以理解）。

3. 团队协同重于个人英雄主义

虽然在自己熟悉的位置处理球是最佳选择，但游戏绝不会像某些强调个人技术的作品那样，允许明星选手“一穿多”。它要求五名队员必须像精密仪器的齿轮般无缝配合——这一点在赛事级对战中尤为明显。

总结：无论你是追求竞技巅峰的硬核玩家，还是寻找优质体验的休闲玩家，都能在Rematch中找到属于自己的位置。

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

‌Rematch is a deeply strategic, hardcore fair-play competitive game. ‌ I wouldn't have invested so much time diving deep into it if it weren't incredibly fun.  I personally competed in the official China National Championship, battling my way from the group stages all the way to the finals (where I ultimately secured second place).  Here are my key takeaways based on that experience:

‌Dynamic Role-Swapping System‌

The game ditches fixed positions, setting it completely apart from traditional football games.  It demands players swap roles in real-time during a match.  You absolutely cannot just camp in one spot (like a goalkeeper only guarding the net) and expect to succeed.  Take my experience playing keeper: I wasn't just defending the last line;  I had to instantly transition into a support player during our offensive phases.  This design completely shatters traditional role barriers, forcing every player to master the entire game.
‌Game Balance & Bug Fixing‌

For a small dev team, the developers have been impressively proactive with balance adjustments and bug fixes.  I initially worried they might ignore player feedback, but they've consistently gathered input and pushed out optimizations (though the fix pace might feel a bit slow – totally understandable given the team size).
‌Team Synergy Over Solo Play‌

While playing the ball in your most comfortable role is ideal, Rematch doesn't allow star players to "1v5" like some skill-focused titles do.  It requires all five teammates to mesh seamlessly, like cogs in a well-oiled machine – this becomes crystal clear in tournament-level play.
‌In short:‌ Whether you're a hardcore competitor chasing the pinnacle or a casual player seeking a quality experience, you ‌will‌ find your place in Rematch.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Rematchは戦略性の深いガチ向け公平対戦ゲームです。‌ 面白くなければ、こんなに時間を費やして没頭したりしません。実際に中国公式大会に出場し、予選から決勝戦（準優勝）まで戦い抜いた経験から、以下が私の実感です：

‌ダイナミックロールチェンジシステム‌
固定ポジションが存在せず、従来のサッカーゲームとは一線を画します。試合中に‌リアルタイムで役割を交代‌する必要があり、特定ポジション（例：GKがゴールを守るだけ）に留まっていては絶対に勝てません。私がGKを務めた経験で言えば、守備時は最終ラインを守りつつ、攻撃時には即座にサポート役に転じる必要がありました。この設計は伝統的なポジションの壁を打ち破り、全プレイヤーに‌戦況全体の把握を強いる‌のです。

‌ゲームバランスとバグ修正‌
小規模開発チームにも関わらず、運営はバランス調整とバグ修正に‌驚くほど積極的‌でした。当初は開発チームがプレイヤーの声を無視するのではと懸念しましたが、実際には意見を収集し継続的に改善（修正ペースは遅めですが、チーム規模を考えれば十分理解できます）を重ねています。

‌個人プレイよりチーム連携‌
得意ポジションでプレイするのが理想ではあるものの、このゲームは「個人スキルで敵を複数倒す」ようなプレイを許しません。5人のメンバーが‌精密機械の歯車のように連携‌することが必須。これは特に大会レベルの対戦では顕著です。

‌結論：‌ 競技の頂点を目指すガチ勢にも、質の高い体験を求めるカジュアル勢にも、Rematchには必ず‌居場所が見つかります‌。

The game has awesome bones. Mechanically, it is the most fun version of soccer I've played in a long time. However, the game has a laundry list of problems that stops me from recommending it at this moment. The servers are among the worst I have ever played on to the point where 40 ping feels almost unplayable due to stutter and rubberbanding. The game has egregious bugs that can ruin matches entirely like the ball being kicked into outer space making the rest of the match unplayable, or your player losing collision with the ball making it impossible to assist your team for the remainder of the match. There are also small issues like the ui telling you that you have been reset to level 1 or post match summary constantly kicking you out of the scoreboard to look at your player card for no reason. Cosmetics allow you to change their colors in the menus but then do not reflect those changes in an actual match. I did save the worst for last though. The achievements are bugged so good luck trying to hundred percent the game anytime soon. 

If the game receives continued support and these issues are addressed the game is absolutely worth a buy. Until then, save your money.

Edit for posterity:

As roughly 6 months have gone by very little has improved and player count has fallen off a cliff. DO NOT BUY. If it goes free to play knock yourself out.

I thought the devs would fix glitches and bugs as soon as possible. Not only did they release an unfinished mess, but they also aren't fixing it properly! Instead, they seem more focused on adding new items to the store. The game literally has no core features other than letting you play with friends — and yes, that’s the only real feature it offers.No leaderboards, no club/guild system, no tournament support in asia region, no in-game achievements or medel system that can make us happy to play any role, no ranked rewards, no events. In short, you're just playing ranked football matches with your friends — filled with glitches and missing content. Even the ranking system is flawed. You gain 20 points for a win, but lose 18 for a defeat, and the penalty gets a little more with your rank.Why rush the release like this? You could’ve waited and released a complete game. Right now, it feels like I’m playing the very first beta test.Ill suggest not to buy this ♥♥♥♥ unless they fixed everything and make this game actually enjoyable as it should be!

Fun gameplay loop, but doesn't feel like there's enough to make this a long-term title like other sports games.

If you like pick up and play titles for short sessions, then it's fine. If you want something with more depth beyond moment to moment gameplay, then you'll be disappointed.

I like it as a short stint game, so it gets a cautious recommendation.

Edit

Unfortunately, had to switch this to not recommended. The developers are really struggling with timely updates, and most of them make the game arguably worse.

The latest patch as of September 5, 2025 actually introduces significant delay in basic movement actions for all positions. Leading to a game that feels incredibly sluggish, and is a far-cry from any of the versions before it. To make matters even worse, none of the most popular exploits or boring "meta" tactics have been resolved; instead, the experience for all players is just worse.

I'm not sure if this effort is just above the ability of SloClap, but the game is in a poor state at the moment. And there's no sign of any meaningful additions being made, such as new modes or methods of play.

Until the developers have shown that they can get things under control, I wouldn't recommend buying this title.

Definitely grab the game. £20 is not too expensive.

Hi Sloclap and Rematch team,

First of all, thank you for your hard work. We truly enjoy playing Rematch — the spirit of competition and communication within the game is something we deeply appreciate.

However, we believe that in-game voice chat alone is not sufficient for effective communication, especially in team-based or public matches. A text chat feature is greatly needed. While it’s understandable that unwanted messages and toxicity can arise, we believe that the solution lies not in removing communication altogether, but in implementing tools such as muting, reporting, or filtering messages.

We sincerely hope you consider adding an optional in-game text chat — it would significantly improve coordination and player engagement, especially for players who may not be able to use voice chat effectively.

Thank you again for creating such a promising experience. Looking forward to future updates! AND FİX THE SERVERS.
